examples: One prominent symptom of the disease is progressive loss of memory.
Victoria was strangely undisturbed by this symptom, even though her husband and family were frightened.
Your problem with keeping boyfriends is just a symptom of a larger problem: making and keeping friends.
This is bad, if for no other reason than the antiglobalists dangerously mistake symptom for cause.
The tremors were always the worst symptom and the ones that bothered me the most.
